extortion.description: Acting in the market since 2004 and with great experience of laboratories in the interior of the state of Rio de Janeiro. Now comes a new concept in veterinary diagnoses, Life.vet. We have as main objective the excellence in customer service, quality in transportation and sample processing, constant professional updating and new techniques in diagnostics. All this combined with cutting-edge technology in information management equipment and systems. Our new concept is based on a qualified team of veterinarians, biomedicals, production engineer and specialized technicians. All trained to provide all assistance and performing the most varied types of exams.
